name: Chauncey Haughton
description: American jazz clarinetist, saxophonist and pianist (1909-1989)

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Salute to Ella Fitzgerald

about_quotes.speaker: Teddy McRae
about_quotes.evidence: And those were the alto players -- neither one of those guys could play good at the first alto player... Chauncey Haughton came back.

about_quotes.speaker: Joe Wilder
about_quotes.evidence: He was a fine teacher and pointed me in the right direction... He helped me a great deal.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joe Wilder — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
